odoo.data:
-->
antivirus.assets.windows.list asset.asset 99
antivirus.assets.linux.list asset.asset 99
antivirus.assets.macos.list asset.asset 99
Windows Assets asset.asset list [('os_platform', '=', 'windows')] {'default_os_platform': 'windows', 'antivirus_assets_view': True}
No Windows assets found
Windows assets registered in the system will appear here for antivirus management.
Linux Assets asset.asset list [('os_platform', '=', 'linux')] {'default_os_platform': 'linux', 'antivirus_assets_view': True}
No Linux assets found
Linux assets registered in the system will appear here for antivirus management.
macOS Assets asset.asset list [('os_platform', '=', 'macos')] {'default_os_platform': 'macos', 'antivirus_assets_view': True}
No macOS assets found
macOS assets registered in the system will appear here for antivirus management.
Antivirus Assets asset.asset list [('os_platform', '=', 'windows')] {'default_os_platform': 'windows', 'antivirus_assets_view': True}
No Antivirus Assets found
Assets registered in the system will appear here for antivirus management.
antivirus.threat.list antivirus.threat
antivirus.threat.form antivirus.threat
All Antivirus Threats antivirus.threat list,form
No threats detected
All detected threats will appear here
Windows Antivirus Threats antivirus.threat list,form [('os_platform', '=', 'windows')] {'search_default_os_platform': 'windows'}
Linux Antivirus Threats antivirus.threat list,form [('os_platform', '=', 'linux')] {'search_default_os_platform': 'linux'}
macOS Antivirus Threats antivirus.threat list,form [('os_platform', '=', 'macos')] {'search_default_os_platform': 'macos'}
antivirus.scan.log.list antivirus.scan.log
antivirus.scan.log.form antivirus.scan.log
All Antivirus Scan Logs antivirus.scan.log list,form
No scan logs found
Scan history will appear here
Windows Antivirus Scan Logs antivirus.scan.log list,form [('os_platform', '=', 'windows')] {'search_default_os_platform': 'windows'}
Linux Antivirus Scan Logs antivirus.scan.log list,form [('os_platform', '=', 'linux')] {'search_default_os_platform': 'linux'}
macOS Antivirus Scan Logs antivirus.scan.log list,form [('os_platform', '=', 'macos')] {'search_default_os_platform': 'macos'}
antivirus.license.form antivirus.license
Antivirus License antivirus.license form current
antivirus.config.form antivirus.config

antivirus.windows.assets.list asset.asset 100
Windows Antivirus asset.asset list [('os_platform', '=', 'windows')] {'default_os_platform': 'windows', 'search_default_av_os_windows': 1}
No Windows assets found
Windows assets registered in the system will appear here for antivirus management.
